name: Squash Croquettes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the squash in a small amount of water until tender.
2. Drain and mash the squash.
3. Add 2 cups breadcrumbs and the next five ingredients (green onion, eggs, parmesan cheese, salt, and pepper).
4. If the mixture is too soft, add more breadcrumbs.
5. Shape the mixture into 18 logs.
6. Roll each log in cornmeal.
7. Deep-fry in hot oil (375 degrees F/190 degrees C) until golden brown.
Yield: 8 servings
